video_prompt: Close-up shot of a necklace pendant emitting a brilliant golden light. The pendant glows intensely, with rays of light spreading outward. The background is a dark and ruined street, but the focus is on the pendant's radiant glow. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, sparkles and lens flare.
negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, distorted, violent, gore, blood, scary, nudity, text, watermark, logo
